MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: P. Dias, Reporter: Leticia Perez. Susan Parkinson, Esq. represented Plaintiff, James Chiu and there being no appearance by Defendant Jason Gera, the cause is ordered off settlement conference, request for jury trial is stricken and the trial date is confirmed.
